hero_section.title: Ghee Infused Lip Butter
hero_section.short_description: Enriched with natural oil and Vitamin E. No added preservative and artificial colours or flavor.

story_section.heading: Pure ritual, honest formulation.
story_section.description: Enriched with natural oil and Vitamin E. No added preservative and artificial colours or flavor.
main_benefits: Provides a smooth base and acts as lip sleeping mask
benefits_list: Chemical free, provides a smooth base
suitability: For pigmented and dry and chapped lips
safety_warnings: Patch test mandatory for natural products too
how_to_use: Best to apply in the night
